iran_nuke.notes: Day 14 — FALLING (mixed). CRITICAL NEW: NYT reports US strikes 'effectively buried Iran’s stockpile of enriched uranium at the Isfahan facility.' Military officials + weapons inspectors confirm facilities 'badly damaged, though not destroyed.' Without Isfahan stockpile, 'nearly impossible for Iranian military to produce nuclear weapon.' Parchin nuclear facility also struck. US reportedly considering high-risk mission to secure uranium. HOWEVER: Iran still enriching at 60% (only non-nuclear state). IAEA access still denied. Fordow status unclear. Net: Isfahan stockpile buried = major de-escalation for nuke pathway, but enrichment capability persists. Down from 19→15.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 14 — RISING. NEW: 6 US crew killed in KC-135 refueling plane crash (NYT). Hegseth vows to reopen Strait 'when militarily possible.' Netanyahu: Israel 'crushing' Iranian regime + Hezbollah. Khamenei threatens to 'set region’s oil and gas on fire' if energy infrastructure attacked. Oil still elevated. 2,200 Marines en route. Naval degradation continuing (90+ vessels) but Iran defiant with Hormuz blockade + drone strikes on Oman. Combined force struck regime repression targets (Basij, IRGC, LEC) + military bases (Artesh 92nd Armored Ahvaz, 56th Younes Artillery). Up from 60→65.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 14 — ESCALATING FAST. CNN: Israel 'seizes moment to finish Hezbollah.' Reuters: Israel strikes heart of Beirut, signals 'long campaign.' Guardian: Israel orders south Lebanon evacuation, strikes Beirut + south Lebanon. Washington Post: 800K displaced, 680+ killed. IDF striking senior Hezbollah operatives, command infrastructure, weapons depots, missile launchers. 2 IDF soldiers killed, 14 wounded. Katz: 'no time limit.' Hezbollah rocket fire continues (most intercepted). Netanyahu: Israel 'crushing' Hezbollah. Bloomberg: expanded incursion into south Lebanon preparing. Up from 67→74.

turkey.notes: CRITICAL THRESHOLD — ENTERED CRITICAL ZONE. Third Iranian ballistic missile intercepted by NATO over Turkey (Mar 13). NYT/Reuters/Bloomberg/Al Jazeera/France24 all confirming. Turkey formally asking Tehran to clarify. Ankara warns Tehran against further attacks. Three intercepts in 9 days (Mar 4, 9, 13). South Korea issued travel advisory for SE Turkey. NATO air defenses actively engaged. Each intercept increases Article 5 proximity pressure. Up from 23→30 — crossed into CRITICAL zone.

india.notes: India monitoring Hormuz crisis — 27 Indian-flagged ships stuck in Persian Gulf (1 started moving). No India-Pakistan friction. Stable.

russia.notes: Trump eased Russian oil sanctions (30-day waiver) to ease Hormuz energy crisis — benefits Russia economically. Russia continues arms supply to Iran while calling for ceasefire. Russia helping Iran with drone tactics (FDD). Putin-Trump diplomacy ongoing. Net effect: sanctions relief offsets arms supply signal. Down slightly from 8→7.

china.notes: China sharply reduced military flights around Taiwan — analysts unsure why. Brief pause followed by resumed but reduced operations. Trump-Xi summit planned Mar 31-Apr 2. China notably silent on Iran war. Mediating Pakistan-Afghanistan. Falling trend as de-escalation in Taiwan Strait visible.

north_korea.notes: Kim Jong Un and daughter observed cruise missile tests from Choe Hyon destroyer (Mar 10-12). Continued testing pattern. DPRK condemned US ME attacks. Fact-check: no confirmed Israeli strike on DPRK embassy in Tehran. SCMP: Iran-DPRK cooperation revival 'highly likely.' Stable elevated.

russia_ukraine.notes: ISW: continued Russian offensive. Ukraine struck Russian electronics plant supplying missile components. Russia scorched-earth on Ukraine energy grid near collapse (NYT). Ukraine struck Russian oil depots in occupied Azovske. Russia earned ~€6bn in 2 weeks from energy crisis. Trump eased Russian sanctions (30-day waiver). Stable elevated.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Entering 3rd week. Overnight strikes in Kabul, Kandahar, Paktia, Paktika — 6+ civilians killed. Fuel depots at Kandahar airport struck. Border fighting at Spin Boldak/Mohmand. China's envoy mediating. Pakistan state TV calls strikes 'successful.' Taliban accuses Pakistan of targeting homes. Stable elevated.

top_signals: NYT: US strikes 'effectively buried Iran's stockpile of enriched uranium at Isfahan' — nearly impossible for Iran to produce nuclear weapon without it (NYT)
Third Iranian ballistic missile intercepted by NATO over Turkey — Turkey asks Tehran to clarify, warns against further attacks (Reuters/Bloomberg/Al Jazeera)
Israel strikes heart of Beirut, orders south Lebanon evacuation — 800K displaced, 680+ killed, expanding incursion preparing (Reuters/Guardian/CNN)
6 US crew killed in KC-135 refueling plane crash — Hegseth vows to reopen Strait 'when militarily possible' (NYT)
Netanyahu: Israel 'crushing' Iranian regime and Hezbollah — strikes on regime repression targets (Basij, IRGC, LEC) + military bases (Times of Israel/ISW)
Khamenei threatens to 'set region's oil and gas on fire' if energy infrastructure attacked (Times of Israel)
IDF strikes Parchin nuclear facility + regime checkpoints in Tehran for first time (JPost)
Pentagon deploying 2,200 Marines to Middle East — combined US-Israeli force striking internal security facilities (ABC/ISW)

new: iran_nuke: buried_isfahan ACTIVATED — NYT confirms Isfahan uranium stockpile buried by US strikes, 'nearly impossible' to produce weapon without it (weight -10)
iran_nuke: diplomacy_refused REPLACED with iaea_access_denied + buried_isfahan — enrichment continues but stockpile gone
iran_conventional: us_crew_killed ACTIVATED — 6 US crew killed in KC-135 refueling plane crash (weight +5)
turkey: zone UPGRADED to CRITICAL — third missile intercept + Turkey demands clarification from Tehran, warns against further attacks
israel_lebanon: ESCALATING — Israel strikes heart of Beirut, orders south Lebanon evacuation, preparing expanded incursion
zone_changes: turkey: elevated (23) → critical (30) — third NATO missile intercept in 9 days + Turkey formally demands Tehran explanation
iran_nuke: elevated (19) → elevated (15) — falling but still elevated (60% enrichment persists despite Isfahan stockpile buried)
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: KEY DE-ESCALATION: Isfahan uranium stockpile buried — NYT/military officials confirm strikes 'effectively buried' enriched uranium, making nuclear weapon production 'nearly impossible' without it. This is the most significant de-escalation signal on the Iran nuclear track since the war began. KEY ESCALATION: Turkey now in CRITICAL zone — three Iranian missile intercepts in 9 days. Turkey demanding explanation, warning Tehran. Each intercept increases NATO Article 5 proximity pressure. Israel-Lebanon escalation accelerating (Beirut heart struck, evacuation orders). 6 US crew killed adds to casualty pressure. The nuclear de-escalation is offset by Turkey-Israel conventional escalations.

latest_news.headline: NYT: US strikes 'effectively buried Iran's stockpile of enriched uranium at Isfahan'
latest_news.text: Military officials and international weapons inspectors confirmed nuclear facilities were badly damaged, though not destroyed. Strikes 'effectively buried Iran's stockpile of enriched uranium at Isfahan.' Without stockpile, 'nearly impossible for Iranian military to produce nuclear weapon.' US reportedly considering high-risk mission to secure uranium.

latest_news.headline: Turkey asks Tehran to clarify — third Iranian missile intercepted by NATO
latest_news.source: Reuters / NYT / Bloomberg / Al Jazeera / France24
latest_news.text: Third ballistic missile from Iran shot down by NATO air defenses over Turkey in 9 days. Turkey formally asking Tehran to clarify. Ankara warns against further attacks. NATO intercepts confirmed by Turkish Defense Ministry.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes heart of Beirut, orders south Lebanon evacuation — expanding incursion
latest_news.text: Israel strikes heart of Beirut, signals 'long campaign.' Orders evacuation of south Lebanon. Targeting senior Hezbollah operatives, command infrastructure, weapons depots. 800K displaced, 680+ killed. Bloomberg: expanded incursion into south Lebanon preparing.

latest_news.headline: 6 US crew killed in KC-135 refueling plane crash — Hegseth vows to reopen Strait
latest_news.text: Six US crew members killed in refueling plane crash. Hegseth vows to reopen Strait of Hormuz 'when militarily possible.' Oil prices remain high.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu: Israel 'crushing' Iran and Hezbollah — strikes on regime targets
latest_news.text: Netanyahu's first press conference since war: Israel 'crushing' Iranian regime and Hezbollah. Combined force struck regime repression targets: Basij, IRGC, LEC stations. Military bases hit: Artesh 92nd Armored (Ahvaz), 56th Younes Artillery (Sarvestan).

latest_news.headline: IDF strikes Parchin nuclear facility + regime checkpoints in Tehran for first time
latest_news.text: IAF struck Iranian nuclear facility at Parchin-Taleghan 2 and various regime targets, including for the first time regime checkpoints in Tehran.

latest_news.headline: Khamenei threatens to 'set region's oil and gas on fire' if infrastructure attacked
latest_news.text: Iran's new Supreme Leader threatens to 'set region's oil and gas on fire' if Iran's energy infrastructure is attacked. Continued defiance despite naval degradation.

latest_news.headline: Russia scorched-earth attacks put Ukraine's power grid near collapse
latest_news.text: Russia attacked critical substation supplying Kyiv. Ukraine's energy grid near collapse after sustained Russian strikes. Meanwhile, Russia earned ~€6bn in 2 weeks from energy crisis. Trump's 30-day sanctions waiver benefits Russia.

outlook: CRITICAL — MIXED ESCALATION/DE-ESCALATION: Day 14 evening brings a split picture. DE-ESCALATION on Iran nuclear: NYT confirms Isfahan uranium stockpile buried by strikes, making weapon production 'nearly impossible' without it. This is the most significant nuclear de-escalation signal since the war began. Parchin also struck. US reportedly considering mission to secure buried uranium. ESCALATION on three fronts: (1) TURKEY now in CRITICAL ZONE — three Iranian missiles intercepted by NATO in 9 days. Turkey demanding Tehran explanation, warning against further attacks. Each intercept raises Article 5 pressure. (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON accelerating — heart of Beirut struck, south Lebanon evacuation ordered, expanded incursion preparing. 800K displaced, 680+ killed. (3) IRAN CONVENTIONAL rising — 6 US crew killed, 2,200 Marines deploying, Khamenei threatens to 'set region's oil and gas on fire,' regime targets struck (Basij, IRGC, LEC). Key watch for next 12h: whether Turkey moves toward Article 4 invocation, whether expanded Lebanon incursion opens full-scale second front, whether Isfahan stockpile burial reduces Iran's nuclear desperation calculus or increases conventional defiance.
